block_01: Yahan 85% se adhik Win Rate ke saath ek Secret Binary Options Rananiti hai.
block_03: Hum dekh rahe hain ki aapne kuchh dinon se apne trading account ko check nahi kiya hai. Yadi aapko prarna ki jarurat hai to ek naya tareeka apnaayen — Udaaharan ke lliye, chhote avadhi wale deal ke liye saral trading rananiti.
block_12: Yah rananiti do indicator ke upyog par aadharit hai: Vortex aur True Strength Indicator (TSI). Vortex rujhaan ke disha ko ingit karta hai aur True Strength Indicator (TSI) noise ko filter karta hai.
block_15: Vortex aur TSI indicators ka upyog default settings ke saath karen.
block_16: In indicators me red aur blue lines hote hain. Vortex aur TSI dono me lines ke paar karne ki pratiksha karen. In lines ko ya to ek saath ya ek ke baad ek turant paar karna chahiye.
block_17: Higher dabayen jab blue lines red lines ke upar chala jaaye.
block_18: Lower dabayen jabblue lines red lines ke neeche chala jaaye.
block_19: Price me vridhi ke liye ek option khareedne ka sanket
block_20: Price me giraavat ke liye ek option khareedne ka sanket
block_22: Vortex Rananiti ka upyog karke safal trend trading ke udaaharan
